notes: Paper text contains the normalized setpoint/action-scale formula.
IsaacLab JointPositionAction applies raw_action * scale + default offset, and the RSL-RL wrapper can clip normalized actions.
The official G1 action-scale audit expands all 29 controllable joints.
Deployment controller standby default_position is available and nonzero.
The adapter fixture uses an official default pose source, not all-zero fallback.
MuJoCo mapping joint order matches action-scale row order.
MuJoCo position actuator order matches action-scale row order.
A deployment-compatible MuJoCo XML patch was written for no pre-physics action clipping.
The patched MuJoCo actuator order still matches action-scale row order.
A zero normalized action maps exactly to theta_default.
A +1 action changes each joint by +action_scale.
A -1 action changes each joint by -action_scale.
A larger action clips to the configured normalized-action bound for the fixture.
The fixture's unit action setpoints stay inside the patched MuJoCo actuator ctrlrange.
This audit does not run physics or claim policy/VAE/diffusion success.
